title: Star Remains Secret Legacy
description: Add Some funny and pragmatic item
body:
added some interesting item to the game.



## [Partial Special Enchantments]

Neko Love: (Anvil) Enhanced with a tropical fish to bind to the player.
Unbreakable: (Anvil) Reinforced with Netherite blocks five times to unlock the indestructible effect.
Myriad Phenomena: (Anvil) Synthesized with bamboo to merge enchantments.



<details>
<summary>Enchantment</summary>

- Neko Blade :The lower the durability of the weapon, the more damage it deals.
- Neko God :Attacks have a probability (subject to luck) of inflicting true damage (amount of damage: maxhealth*(exp/100)%).
- Neko Meow : meow,meow....
- Neko King:Weapons can be strengthened.
- Neko Emperor :Boosts damage based on number of kills.
- Neko Day:Boosts damage during the day and lowers it at night.
- Neko Night:Boosts damage at night, lowers damage during the day.
- Neko Ninja:Gain stealth and strength when attacked.
- Neko Soul:Gain souls when attacking, consume souls to heal yourself when hit.
- Neko Chop:There is a probability of obtaining a biological head
- Neko Love:Anti-lost
- Confusion: Attacked creatures treat other creatures nearest to the player as targets
- Purify: Clear entity data
- Break Defense: Gives a defense-breaking effect
- Bright: Monsters avoid it when holding it.
- Alone: Only this enchantment provides a damage bonus that varies with the number of times it is used.
- Death Proclamation: Countdown to Life
- Fetters: Fetters
- Indestructible: Prevent destruction when in a dropped state.
- Unbreakable: Use NETHERITE BLOCK at the Anvil to strengthen it five times to unlock it.
- Vampirism: Vampirism.
- Coagulation: Limit mobs heal.
- ☠ Disease: Gain random negative effects when attacking
- ☠ Corrode: Attacks have a chance to lose half of their current durability
- Duality: G:Up Loot, B:Up Atk.
- The World: Time Stop!
- [Test] Myriad Phenomena: Myriad Phenomena

add more
</details>




Have a nice game  


Any questions can be asked in github or contacted as below:  
- [Telegram](https://url.anye.dev/tg)
- [Discord](https://url.anye.dev/discord)
